headline: Bitcoin Oversold: 70K Rebound Looms Amid 2020-Low Readings

article.title: Bitcoin most oversold since 2020 crash: Can BTC rebound to $70K next?
article.summary: Bitcoin’s latest oversold RSI mirrors 2020 and February 2026 setups that preceded 50% and 30% rebounds, putting $70K back in focus.

article.title: ETH falls to 13-month low on Zcash bug news and Bitcoin drop to sub-$60K: Is $1.4K next?
article.summary: ETH price crashed below $1,600 as a vulnerability in Zcash emerged and Bitcoin sold off below $60,000 for the first time in months.

headline: Seoul Acts to Halt 10% Won Plunge

article.title: South Korea Unveils Measures to Stem Won Slide, Curb Speculation
article.summary: South Korea laid out a series of targeted measures to curb pressure on the won after the currency slid to its weakest level since 2009, pledging firm action against speculative trading and other activities that authorities said had amplified recent market swings.

headline: $10M Yacht Engulfed in Flames Near Singapore

article.title: Fire Erupts on Luxury Yacht Near Singapore's Sentosa Cove
article.summary: Firefighters attempt to extinguish a fire that broke out on a luxury yacht berthed in Singapore's Sentosa Cove. (Source: Bloomberg)

headline: Zcash Plunges 12% Amid AI-Exposed Security Flaw

article.summary: Researchers say prompt injection attacks could manipulate AI coding agents to access sensitive credentials stored in software development pipelines.

article.summary: The move follows World Liberty Financial's apparent freeze of HTX-linked on-chain addresses, citing UK sanctions compliance, per HTX.

headline: Hyperion DeFi unwinds $29m HYPE deals amid USDH exit

article.title: Hyperion DeFi to unwind $29 million in HYPE deals with Felix, Native Markets as USDH sunsets
article.summary: Roughly 800,000 HYPE will return to the company's treasury for redeployment to "more profitable" strategies, per a Friday filing.
